data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the annual renewal requirement.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aims to validate the 'Annual renewal requirement' but lacks concrete evidence to confirm its implementation. While the linked use case mentions this requirement, there are no specific API reads or persisted state checks provided that demonstrate how this requirement is satisfied. Therefore, the validation is inconclusive due to the absence of necessary evidence.
gaps: No evidence confirming the implementation of the annual renewal requirement.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the annual renewal requirement.
